## Verification

- [ ] Added or updated regression tests
- [ ] `bun run build`
- [ ] `bun run typecheck`
- [ ] `bun run typecheck:examples`
- [ ] `bun test`
- [ ] `bun run docs:build` when documentation or public APIs changed

## Public API and operations

- [ ] No public API change
- [ ] Public API and package documentation updated
- [ ] Database migration impact reviewed
- [ ] Queue, retry, idempotency, and failure behavior reviewed
- [ ] No secrets or personal data included
